entity.summary: Australia-based cryptocurrency exchange developed by Sydney company Chrono.tech and operating under the TimeX brand.
entity.notes: Official TimeX and Chrono.tech materials identify the service as Australian. The earlier Ukraine origin is replaced with Australia. The exact public launch day remains unresolved.

expected.summary: Ukraine-based centralized exchange launched in 2019 and still operating under the TimeX brand.

changes.summary: Australia-based cryptocurrency exchange developed by Sydney company Chrono.tech and operating under the TimeX brand.
changes.notes: Official TimeX and Chrono.tech materials identify the service as Australian. The earlier Ukraine origin is replaced with Australia. The exact public launch day remains unresolved.

events.title: TimeX began operating in 2019
events.description: TimeX began operating in 2019 as an Australian cryptocurrency exchange developed within the Chrono.tech ecosystem.
events.notes: The reviewed official materials support the 2019 year marker but do not establish an exact launch day.

evidence.title: About TimeX
evidence.notes: Official TimeX material describes the service as an Australian cryptocurrency exchange developed by Chrono.tech.

evidence.title: TimeX product page
evidence.notes: Chrono.tech identifies TimeX as one of its exchange products.

evidence.title: TimeX official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies that the TimeX exchange remains accessible and active.
